items.text: When disconnecting cables, always do so from the minus (-) terminal.
When disconnecting cables, always do so from the minus (-) terminal.
Some systems lose stored memory by disconnecting the cable.
Some systems lose stored memory by disconnecting the cable.

blocks.text: Turn ignition OFF (LOCK) mode. Disconnect the coupler (A). Disconnect the 12V battery sensor (B) from the negative (-) terminal of the 12V battery. 12V battery Disconnect cable (D) from sensor. 12V battery Remove cover (E) from sensor.

items: To prevent breakage, do not hold the connector part (C) and do not perform the detachment operation.
Be careful not to overtighten the terminals as this may damage the fasteners.

items.text: If 12V battery power is cancelled, the following items do not need to be learned.
If 12V battery power is cancelled, the following items do not need to be learned.

Before installing the 12V battery sensor on a 12V battery, inspect the 12V battery terminals for corrosion, and if corrosion is present, polish the terminals with a sodium bicarbonate solution and rinse them clean with warm water.

Before installing the 12V battery sensor on a 12V battery, inspect the 12V battery terminals for corrosion, and if corrosion is present, polish the terminals with a sodium bicarbonate solution and rinse them clean with warm water.
If the 12V battery and cable terminals are dirty, clean them with a wire brush or sandpaper before installation.
If the 12V battery and cable terminals are dirty, clean them with a wire brush or sandpaper before installation.

blocks.text: 12V battery Attach cover (B) to sensor (A). Apply grease to the 12V battery terminals. Connect the 12V battery sensor to the negative (-) terminal of the 12V battery. 12V battery Connect cable (D) to sensor. Connect the coupler (E).

items: To prevent breakage, do not hold the connector part (C) and do not perform the detachment operation.
Tighten the 12V battery terminals with torque within the specified range depending on the looseness of the terminals.

items.text: To prevent breakage, do not hold the connector part (C) and do not perform the detachment operation.
To prevent breakage, do not hold the connector part (C) and do not perform the detachment operation.
Tighten the 12V battery terminals with torque within the specified range depending on the looseness of the terminals.
Tighten the 12V battery terminals with torque within the specified range depending on the looseness of the terminals.
